raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Over 20% of Californians experience food insecurity.",
    "Food insecurity is deeply tied to health, educational outcomes, and economic stability.",
    "AB 518 aims to improve access to CalFresh benefits by removing barriers.",
    "AB 518 establishes a process to identify eligible individuals who are not currently enrolled in CalFresh.",
    "AB 518 will enhance outreach strategies to improve the administration of CalFresh.",
```
